task_description:
# GraphQL Resolver Database Connections

Connect all 50+ GraphQL resolvers to the Neon PostgreSQL database using Drizzle ORM. This includes query resolvers for brands, mentions, GEO scores, recommendations, audits, content, subscriptions, and integrations.

## Rationale
Critical foundation - without database connections, the entire platform displays static/mock data. This blocks all other features from functioning with real data.

## User Stories
- As a business leader, I want to see my real brand data so that I can make informed decisions
- As a marketing team, I want to track actual AI mentions so that I can measure our visibility

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All query resolvers return data from PostgreSQL database
- [ ] All mutation resolvers persist changes to database
- [ ] Error handling implemented for database failures
- [ ] Connection pooling configured for production scale
